_doc: juliet-c-cpp — strict GT not yet curated. The C/C++ Juliet test suite emits ~87k findings across thousands of CWE-organized test files; auto-curating each line-level is impractical without a Juliet-style GT builder (like buildJulietExpected exists for Java). Marked as wildcards-only until a proper builder is added. Strict line-level scoring is not measurable without further engineering work on a per-method GT builder.
